'''鈭歬-b-dh-p''' ('''kakabdhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lilliputianize|lilliputianize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-b-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lilliputianize|lilliputianize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-b-dh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakabdhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikabdhepoko|thikabdhepoko]] || [[word:jikabdhepoko|jikabdhepoko]] || [[word:shikabdhepoko|shikabdhepoko]] || [[word:kikabdhepoko|kikabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukabdhepoko|thuthukabdhepoko]] || [[word:jujukabdhepoko|jujukabdhepoko]] || [[word:shushukabdhepoko|shushukabdhepoko]] || [[word:kukukabdhepoko|kukukabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukabdhepoko|thukabdhepoko]] || [[word:jukabdhepoko|jukabdhepoko]] || [[word:shukabdhepoko|shukabdhepoko]] || [[word:kukabdhepoko|kukabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukabdhepoko|thukabdhepoko]] || [[word:jukabdhepoko|jukabdhepoko]] || [[word:shukabdhepoko|shukabdhepoko]] || [[word:kukabdhepoko|kukabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekabdhepoko|thekabdhepoko]] || [[word:jekabdhepoko|jekabdhepoko]] || [[word:shekabdhepoko|shekabdhepoko]] || [[word:kekabdhepoko|kekabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokabdhepoko|thothokabdhepoko]] || [[word:jojokabdhepoko|jojokabdhepoko]] || [[word:shoshokabdhepoko|shoshokabdhepoko]] || [[word:kokokabdhepoko|kokokabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokabdhepoko|thokabdhepoko]] || [[word:jokabdhepoko|jokabdhepoko]] || [[word:shokabdhepoko|shokabdhepoko]] || [[word:kokabdhepoko|kokabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokabdhepoko|thokabdhepoko]] || [[word:jokabdhepoko|jokabdhepoko]] || [[word:shokabdhepoko|shokabdhepoko]] || [[word:kokabdhepoko|kokabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kabdhepoko|th忙kabdhepoko]] || [[word:j忙kabdhepoko|j忙kabdhepoko]] || [[word:sh忙kabdhepoko|sh忙kabdhepoko]] || [[word:k忙kabdhepoko|k忙kabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakabdhepoko|thathakabdhepoko]] || [[word:jajakabdhepoko|jajakabdhepoko]] || [[word:shashakabdhepoko|shashakabdhepoko]] || [[word:kakakabdhepoko|kakakabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakabdhepoko|thakabdhepoko]] || [[word:jakabdhepoko|jakabdhepoko]] || [[word:shakabdhepoko|shakabdhepoko]] || [[word:kakabdhepoko|kakabdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakabdhepoko|thakabdhepoko]] || [[word:jakabdhepoko|jakabdhepoko]] || [[word:shakabdhepoko|shakabdhepoko]] || [[word:kakabdhepoko|kakabdhepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
